title: Garlicky Chewy German Tomato Stew
description: A hearty, garlicky, and chewy German-inspired tomato stew made with fresh tomatoes and a hint of garlic, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe uses a traditional German cooking vessel called a Kazan cauldron, which adds a rich and earthy flavor to the dish.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a Kazan cauldron over medium heat.
Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the caraway seeds, flour, and crushed tomatoes.
Add the beef broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 15 minutes, or until the stew has thickened slightly.
Season with salt to taste, if desired.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
